mentions.note: Higher-yielding midstream energy partnership with better growth and yield than Cheniere; Cramer's preference for caller.

Best-run pipeline company; critical feed gas, liquids, fractionation infrastructure (arms dealer to gas/LNG ecosystem). $50B+ revenue; LNG fraction only but benefits from North American build-out. Safe income-generating growth stock.
Yields 5.9%; addresses plastic shortage in US; combined with ETP yields 6-6.5% with growth upside; best course for income investors.
